baseUrl.description: Jira Cloud base URL, e.g. https://your-domain.atlassian.net

assigneeAccountId.description: Target user's Atlassian accountId to detect assignment to. Example: 5b10a2844c20165700ede21g

maxWaitSeconds.description: Maximum total seconds to wait before timing out

jqlScope.description: Optional additional JQL clause to narrow search scope, e.g. project = ABC AND statusCategory != Done (do not include ORDER BY)
